skill.name: Digital Communication
skill.description: Effective communication using digital tools and platforms including email, messaging, and collaborative documents

proficiencyLevel.name: Intermediate
proficiencyLevel.description: Routine independence in common scenarios, selects appropriate digital channels for different communication needs

skill.name: Data Literacy
skill.description: Ability to read, interpret, and communicate data insights for informed decision-making

proficiencyLevel.name: Novice
proficiencyLevel.description: Working knowledge with guidance, can interpret basic charts and summary statistics

skill.name: Cybersecurity Awareness
skill.description: Understanding of cybersecurity best practices, threat awareness, and safe online behavior

proficiencyLevel.name: Intermediate
proficiencyLevel.description: Routine independence in identifying threats and applying security best practices
